original_statement: who did this team play in the last game of this season?
mutated_statement: who did this group play in the last game of this season, and confirm they both faced an outside opponent and faced themselves?
mutation_analysis: Entity substitution + Intent expansion/confirmation request + Number/pronoun shift + Logical contradiction/self-reference: "team" → "group" | Added conjunctive clause asking to confirm they both faced an outside opponent and faced themselves (extra request/condition) | "this team" (singular) → "they both" (plural pronoun shift) | Introduced contradictory claim "faced an outside opponent and faced themselves" (who did this team play in the last game of this season? → who did this group play in the last game of this season, and confirm they both faced an outside opponent and faced themselves?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought多次指出“Prediction Answer is missing/blank”并明确正确信息（最后一场对手为Kosovo，且“面对外部对手”为真、“面对自己”为假），以及critique反复指出使用了不被允许的simple_query、缺乏推理步骤与未请求澄清（iterations 0–5 的 judge_thought 与多次 tree_and_critic 指出）。Agent 的具体表现为反复调用同一不支持的操作(simple_query)、没有输出答案或确认信息、也未提出澄清矛盾的追问，表现出机械重复尝试而非识别或修正矛盾。因为代理既未就“既面对外部对手又面对自己”的自相矛盾部分做逻辑解释，也未请求用户澄清，且在执行上忽略了矛盾要求，故归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”。
